message.content:
@startuml
title AU2048 Demo Mode Button Sequence Diagram

actor User
participant MainActivity
participant Controller
participant MainActivityFragment
boundary BoardView
database Model

User -> MainActivity : Starts App
MainActivity -> Controller : onCreate()
MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment : onCreate()
MainActivityFragment -> BoardView : onCreateView()

loop [watntsToContinue == true]
  note left of MainActivity : Press Demo Mode
  MainActivityFragment -> Controller : ResetClick(View)
  Controller -> Controller : reset()
  Controller -> Model : setArr()
  Controller -> Model : setScore()
  Model --> Controller : doesWantToContinue()
  Controller -> MainActivityFragment : setupArrView()
  Controller -> MainActivityFragment : setArrView()
  MainActivityFragment -> BoardView : onCreateView()
  BoardView --> MainActivityFragment : BoardView

  alt [demo == true]
    alt [button_direction == up]
      MainActivityFragment -> Controller : UpClick(View)
      Controller --> MainActivityFragment :
    else [button_direction == left]
      MainActivityFragment -> Controller : LeftClick(View)
      Controller --> MainActivityFragment :
    else [button_direction == down]
      MainActivityFragment -> Controller : DownClick(View)
      Controller --> MainActivityFragment :
    else [button_direction == right]
      MainActivityFragment -> Controller : RightClick(View)
      Controller --> MainActivityFragment :
    end

    alt [button_direction == up]
      Controller -> Model : shiftUp()
      Model --> Controller :
    else [button_direction == left]
      Controller -> Model : shiftLeft()
      Model --> Controller :
    else [button_direction == down]
      Controller -> Model : shiftDown()
      Model --> Controller :
    else [button_direction == right]
      Controller -> Model : shiftRight()
      Model --> Controller :
    end

    Controller -> Model : setArr()
    Controller -> Model : setScore()
    Model --> Controller : doesWantToContinue()
    Controller -> MainActivityFragment : setupArrView()
    Controller -> MainActivityFragment : setArrView()
    MainActivityFragment -> BoardView : onCreateView()
    BoardView --> MainActivityFragment : BoardView

    alt [noMovesPossible == false]
      Controller -> Model : checkWin()
      Controller -> MainActivityFragment : win()
      Controller -> Controller : reset()
    else [noMovesPossible == true]
      Controller -> Model : noMovesPossible()
      Controller -> MainActivityFragment : gameover()
      MainActivityFragment -> Controller : Action.DOWN
      Controller -> Controller : reset()
    end
  end
end

Model -> Model : onDestroy()
MainActivityFragment ->x MainActivityFragment : onDestroy()
BoardView ->x BoardView : onDestroy()

User
MainActivity
Controller
MainActivityFragment
BoardView
Model

@enduml
